prs.title: Add Share to Snapchat Feature #199
prs.body:
This PR adds a "Share to Snapchat" feature as described in issue #199.

Changes included:
- Added Snapchat sharing functionality
- Integrated the share button in the UI
- Tested locally to ensure proper functionality

Closes #199

prs.title: Add Share to Instagram feature (#64)
prs.body:
Added a “Share to Instagram” button that lets users copy the current page URL to their clipboard with one click. This allows easy sharing of Love Calculator results on Instagram stories or in the bio.

Key points:
Button added in HTML: 📷 Instagram
JavaScript handles:
Copying page URL to clipboard
Showing temporary feedback (“Copied!”)
Handling errors if copy fails

issues.title: Add Share to Snapchat Feature
issues.body: I would like to add a Share to Snapchat Feature

issues.title: Add Share to Instagram feature
issues.body: would like to add the share to instagram feature.
